'''Yin Earth Rabbit''' is the 16th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 己 Tsuchinoto (yin earth, the luna-aligned face of autumn), and its branch is 卯 U, the [[Rabbit (zodiac)|Rabbit]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the branch's wood overcomes the stem's earth, the lower restraining the high.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Earth Tiger]] (node 15) and [[Yang Metal Dragon]] (node 17).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Tsuchinoto (己)]] — yin earth
* '''Branch:''' [[Rabbit (zodiac)|Rabbit (卯)]] — yin wood
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' autumn

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Earth Tiger]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Metal Dragon]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q1062557}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
